titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 723

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=958 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 11:41:10.616602+00 | translation moa=959 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 11:41:10.605692+00

p.cl:
Sciant tam presentes quam futuri quod Eadwardus filius Petri de Lastailrig Baro regis scott' concessit et dedit atque
hac carta sua confirmauit Rodberto filio Matildis de Berewic et omnibus heredibus suis duas toftes ad Eie
muthe . et unam ad leth . honorifice et libere et quiete atque in pace in feudo et hereditate . ab omni consuetudine et
seruitio tenendas de se et omnibus heredibus suis . reddendo singulis annis . iii . teises de laz .

Testes . Alexander de
Softe lawe . Willelmus filio hugonis de lastailrig . Willelmus prepositus de Berewic . Willelmus Beniue . Alexander
prepositus de Berewic . Willelmus Neue . Reiner . Roger de pagraua clericus Walteri filii Alani .

Let present and future know that Edward son of Peter of Restalrig, baron of the king of Scots, has granted and given and by this his charter made firm to Robert son of Matilda of Berwick and to all his heirs two tofts at Eyemouth, and one at Leith, honourably, freely, quitly, and in peace, from every custom and service, in feu and heritage, to be held of him and his heirs, rendering each year three toises of lace.

Witness Alexander of Softlaw, William son of Hugh of Restalrig, William provost of Berwick, William Benive, Alexander provost of Berwick, William Neve, Rainer, Roger of Palgrave clerk of Walter fitz Alan.
